name: cheetos
creator: squarepoint
description:
Add this extension as a security into your games! If the teacher is getting close, just press the toolbox key and a bunch of math will spawn ;)

HOW TO USE: Add “from cheetos import *” at the top of your script and put “cheat()” in your main loop. You will be able to pause/play your game! To play again, type “69*420” and press exe.
